TestCase z41Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_arr = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_arr, t1.arr, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.arr = follow_case_arr;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n / 2; ++i) {
            double tmp = follow_case.arr[i];
            follow_case.arr[i] = follow_case.arr[follow_case.n - 1 - i];
            follow_case.arr[follow_case.n - 1 - i] = tmp;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
